settings.security.recovery.hint: Generate a new set of backup codes if you lose access to your authenticator.

settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notifications.subtitle: Choose which account and product events SabNode should email or push to you.

Warn when broadcast/SMS/email credits are running out.

settings.notifications.rows.push_approva: Broadcasts and campaigns awaiting your sign-off.

settings.integrations.items.bigquery.des: Stream raw message logs into your BigQuery warehouse for analysis.
settings.integrations.items.mailchimp.de: Sync contact lists and segments between SabNode and Mailchimp.
